backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Tray Rollback (ADR-015 Phase 2(c)). One-deep undo paired with the forward Apply Update flow from 1.8.20. Each Apply now snapshots the existing install to %LOCALAPPDATA%\CadBridgeollback\<prev-ver>\ before copying the new bundle in; the tray exposes a 'Rollback to v{prev}' item that re-runs Setup -RollbackFrom <snap> to restore the previous bytes + relaunch the older agent. UAC-declined and missing-snapshot paths surface as soft failures. Bootstrap effect: rollback first becomes usable after a 1.8.21+ install has applied at least one further update.
